title: That Holy Thing.
content:
They all were looking for a king
        To slay their foes, and lift them high:
    Thou cam'st a little baby thing
        That made a woman cry.

    O son of man, to right my lot
        Nought but thy presence can avail;
    Yet on the road thy wheels are not,
        Nor on the sea thy sail!

    My fancied ways why shouldst thou heed?
        Thou com'st down thine own secret stair:
    Com'st down to answer all my need,
        Yea, every bygone prayer!
meaning:
"That Holy Thing." is a quintessential example of George MacDonald's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
